title: Policy Activation Ledger Entry
description: Schema for a policy activation record. PolicyActivation is the only bridge from CandidateRule to active policy. An activation record requires owner, reviewer, evidence_refs, and decision_receipt. CandidateRule != Policy. Evidence != Authorization. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

activation_id.description: Unique identifier for this activation record.

candidate_rule_id.description: Registry ID of the CandidateRule being activated or considered.

target_policy_id.description: Registry ID of the target policy this activation creates or modifies.

status.description: Activation status: proposed, reviewed, approved, active, rejected, superseded, tombstoned.

owner.description: Accountable party for this activation. Required.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references supporting this activation. Required.

decision_receipt.description: Receipt ID documenting the activation decision.

activated_at.description: ISO date when activation took effect.
